_comment: Paste/adapt into the Vapi dashboard (or POST to /assistant). The system prompt lives in vapi/system_prompt.md. Set server.url to your tunnel + /vapi/webhook. Fast model in-conversation (latency = UX); the strong model runs async in the backend for vendor matching.
name: DME Intake Coordinator
firstMessage: Hi, thanks for calling. I can help you get medical equipment set up. What do you need today?

messages.content: SEE vapi/system_prompt.md, paste its contents here.

function.name: capture_request
function.description: Record what we've learned about the patient's DME request. Call this as you gather details; you can call it multiple times to add more.

recent_visit.description: Had a recent face-to-face PCP visit?

has_order.description: Does a written order already exist?

confidence.description: 0-1, your confidence in this capture; lower it if unsure

function.name: coverage_requirements
function.description: Get the list of steps Medicare requires for a piece of equipment. Returns WHAT IS NEEDED, never a coverage yes/no. Use when the patient asks whether something is covered.
